description: Elixir/Phoenix para Termux no Android ARM64. Inclui Elixir + Erlang via pkg e ElixirLS (LSP) para autocompletar, diagnósticos e navegação de código.

install_steps.command: pkg update -y 2>&1 && pkg install -y elixir erlang 2>&1
install_steps.description: Instalando Elixir e Erlang via pkg

install_steps.command: ELS_VERSION=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/elixir-lsp/elixir-ls/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name"' | sed 's/.*"tag_name": "//;s/".*//' 2>/dev/null) && echo "Versão ElixirLS: $ELS_VERSION" && mkdir -p $HOME/.elixir-ls && curl -L "https://github.com/elixir-lsp/elixir-ls/releases/download/$ELS_VERSION/elixir-ls-v${ELS_VERSION#v}.zip" -o /tmp/elixirls.zip 2>&1 && unzip -o /tmp/elixirls.zip -d $HOME/.elixir-ls 2>&1 && chmod +x $HOME/.elixir-ls/language_server.sh && rm /tmp/elixirls.zip && echo 'OK: ElixirLS instalado'
test -f $HOME/.elixir-ls/language_server.sh && echo 'ElixirLS OK' || echo 'ERRO: ElixirLS não encontrado'

config_steps.command: test -f $HOME/.elixir-ls/language_server.sh && echo 'language_server.sh OK' || echo 'AVISO: ElixirLS não instalado'

sdk_config.new_project_cmd: mix new $name && echo 'OK: projeto Elixir criado'
